creator: O.Seibert@cs.ru.nl
text:
On Wed 05 May 2010 at 01:01:38 +0400, Kirill Ponomarew wrote:
> Could you check the latest port version and tell me if the problem still exists?

I just checked, and alas, the problem persists. Something was "fixed"
with my woraround though, since it now too does not work any more,
with the message

twoquid:.../ports/x11/xterm$ LC_CTYPE=en_US.utf-8 xterm -lc -class UXTerm
Warning: locale not supported by C library, locale unchanged
Cannot chmod /dev/ttypa to 620 currently 666: Operation not permitted

and xterm terminates.

The "chmod" message seems to occur all the time.

Probably something to report upstream...

> K.
-Olaf.
--
